# Copilot instructions (qvcp)

Primary directives live in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md); follow those first.

GitHub-specific extensions:
- When drafting or updating PRs/issues, summarize the behavior change and note any updates to stream selection logic to keep JS variants aligned.
- Bump the userscript `@version` in [video-stream-capture.user.js](../video-stream-capture.user.js) when user-visible behavior changes and reflect the change in [README.md](../README.md).
- Keep docs current when altering workflows (e.g., Brave install steps, PowerShell usage) and link to the relevant sections in PR descriptions.
